scenarios.label: Pharma Supply Chain
scenarios.description: Pharmaceutical delivery planning — catchment analysis, drug demand, route optimisation

prompts.label: 1. Catchment analysis
prompts.prompt: Show me the population health profile within a 10 minute drive of Walgreens at 498 Castro Street, San Francisco

prompts.label: 2. Drug demand
prompts.prompt: Based on that catchment population, what drugs would this pharmacy need most? Consider the diabetes, hypertension, cardiovascular and respiratory rates.

prompts.label: 3. Patient directions
prompts.prompt: Give me driving directions from 742 Valencia Street, San Francisco to Walgreens at 498 Castro Street

prompts.label: 4. Cycling access
prompts.prompt: Show me a 5 minute cycling isochrone from 498 Castro Street, San Francisco for patients without cars

prompts.label: 5. Supply chain plan
prompts.prompt: Plan the full pharmaceutical supply chain delivery from the depot to all SF pharmacies using 3 specialist vehicles

scenarios.label: Retail & Catchment
scenarios.description: Retail site analysis — competitor proximity, drive-time catchments, POI discovery

prompts.label: 1. Store catchment
prompts.prompt: Show me the area reachable within a 10 minute drive from Union Square, San Francisco

prompts.label: 2. Nearby competitors
prompts.prompt: Show me all shops and shopping malls within a 10 minute drive from Union Square, San Francisco

prompts.label: 3. Restaurants
prompts.prompt: Show me restaurants within a 15 minute drive from the Ferry Building, San Francisco

prompts.label: 4. Drive to store
prompts.prompt: Get driving directions from 3100 Scott Street, San Francisco to Union Square

prompts.label: 5. Multi-store route
prompts.prompt: Get driving directions from a warehouse at 1 Market Street to Pier 39, then to Fisherman's Wharf, then to Ghirardelli Square, San Francisco

scenarios.label: Fleet Logistics
scenarios.description: Fleet delivery optimisation — multi-vehicle routing with capacity and skills

prompts.label: 1. Pharma fleet demo
prompts.prompt: Run the SF pharmaceutical fleet delivery demo

prompts.label: 2. HGV directions
prompts.prompt: Get driving directions for a heavy goods vehicle from the Port of San Francisco to 4150 Clement Street

prompts.label: 3. Bike courier
prompts.prompt: Get cycling directions from 1 Market Street to 498 Castro Street, San Francisco

prompts.label: 4. Reachability
prompts.prompt: Show me the area reachable within 20 minutes by HGV from the Port of San Francisco

prompts.label: 5. Custom route
prompts.prompt: I have 2 vehicles starting from 1 Market Street, San Francisco. Optimise routes to deliver to: Walgreens 498 Castro St, CVS 2676 Geary Blvd, Rite Aid 801 Clement St, and Walgreens 2690 Mission St
